name: Majuba TVET Central Office
snippet: The new Central Office is of contemporary design and will establish and promote innovation going forward in the second decade of the millennium.

name: Majuba TVET College – Technical and Vocational Education and
snippet:
A Public Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) Institution under the Continuing Education and Training Act No. 16 of 2006.
Majuba TVET College Trades Under The Auspices of The Department of Higher Education and Training as a Public Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) Institution under the Continuing Education and Training Act No. 16 of 2006, and its programmes are accredited by the Quality Council for Trades and Occupations (QCTO).
